headline: Port Arthur Refinery Blast and Shutdown Might Change The Case For Investing In Valero Energy (VLO)
summary: In early April 2026, Valero Energy suffered a major operational setback when an explosion and fire at its Port Arthur, Texas refinery destroyed a diesel hydrotreater and a key control room, forcing an extended shutdown and sharply reducing crude intake, including Mexican cargoes. This outage at a facility accounting for a meaningful share of Gulf Coast refining capacity highlights how concentrated infrastructure can amplify operational and supply-chain risk for large refiners. We’ll now...
